title: Second Largest Digit in a String
titleCn: 字符串中第二大的数字

testcases.input: s = "dfa12321afd" Output: 2 Explanation: The digits that appear in s are [1, 2, 3]. The second largest digit is 2.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: The digits that appear in s are [1, 2, 3]. The second largest digit is 2.

testcases.input: s = "abc1111" Output: -1 Explanation: The digits that appear in s are [1]. There is no second largest digit.
testcases.expectedOutput: -1 Explanation: The digits that appear in s are [1]. There is no second largest digit.
